meanings.definition: the defensive football players who line up behind the linemen
coil such that current is induced in it by passing a current through the primary coil
being of second rank or importance or value; not direct or immediate
examples: the stone will be hauled to a secondary crusher

meanings.definition: depending on or incidental to what is original or primary

examples: played a secondary role in world events

meanings.definition: belonging to a lower class or rank
